name: Zucchini and Fetta Cheese Souffles
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. Grate the zucchinis and squeeze out any excess moisture.
3. In a bowl, mix the grated zucchini with salt, flour, dry mustard, and milk until well combined.
4. Fold in the crumbled feta cheese and grated Parmesan cheese.
5. Gently fold in the egg yolks, ensuring no air is trapped.
6. Whisk the egg whites until stiff peaks form.
7. Gently fold the beaten egg whites into the zucchini mixture, alternating back and forth.
8. Spoon the batter evenly into greased ramekins or a prepared souffle dish.
9. Place the dish in the preheated oven and bake for 20-25 minutes, or until the souffles have risen and are golden brown on top.
10. Turn off the oven and let the souffles sit for 5 minutes before serving.
